body.title: Knowledge retrieval habit type: graph -> web search -> LLM synthesis -> deposit
body.result: Tool shipped (tiered_research, 119710ef): graph search → DuckDuckGo web → local LLM → cloud LLM synthesis, tested. Remaining work — the automation layer that fires the tool on question-shape triggers and deposits results back into cortex — spun out as T-tiered-research-habit (S). Closing 2026-04-19 audit.
body.description: GitHub issue #255. Imported from GH audit — needs triage.
